markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on launch readiness and workspace admin/roles](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Keep EMs as non-admins for now → Stevie/Carrie will buffer and fix workspace content/UX; avoid risking public pages](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Recategorization fix → use “Backfill last 14 days” in Workspace page after recats to repopulate charts](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [Roles/permissions do not exist yet → current model: GrowthX-admin vs everyone; inviting users today would grant full access; adding roles ≈ couple days of system work](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [Clarify workspace/billing model with Marcel → 1 subscription ↔ 1 workspace? can customers create additional workspaces? who can invite? this determines scope of the “invite users” ticket](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)

## Topics

### EM admin access and workspace stabilization

  - [EMs (sprint team) added to customer workspaces as non-admins → Stevie + Carrie handling manual fixes (subcategory corrections, UX polish) so EMs can demo safely](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [Risk: Admins can break public pages → rationale for holding back admin grants until onboarding + guardrails are sufficient](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Intent: Avoid “panic grant” of admin if workload spikes; Stevie to draft access policy and consult Jason](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)

### Recategorization data consistency

  - [Issue: Recat via admin does not auto-backfill charts](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [Resolution: Use Workspace page action “Backfill last 14 days” → wait \~1 min → metrics repopulate](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [Action: Stevie to run backfill on affected workspace(s) post-call](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)

### Launch readiness: PR reviews and acceptance criteria

  - [Ask: Team to review open PRs and surface unclear tickets or missing launch items](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Ticket hygiene: Stevie to enrich with user stories + AC where helpful; but acknowledge high-change “pre-launch” phase → don’t overinvest in rigid AC that may churn](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Process goal: Reduce reliance on Marcel’s last-minute clarifications by pre-writing intent; Stevie to iterate pragmatically](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)

### Invitations, roles/permissions, and billing/workspace model

  - [Current system: Only two levels → GrowthX admins (Marcel, Jason, Stevie, core team) vs everyone else; no roles within customer workspaces](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [“Invite users to workspace” ticket implications:](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
      - [Straight path now → invited users = full workspace access (no roles)](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
      - [Roles/permissions (owner/admin/member, etc.) require designing a small system → “couple days” build + product decisions](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [Open product questions to settle with Marcel (blocks scope):](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
      - [Subscription linkage → 1 subscription = 1 workspace? confirmed or changed?](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
      - [Multi-workspace capability → can a customer create additional workspaces/brands under a subscription?](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
      - [Invitation authority → who can invite? any member vs owner/admin? cross-workspace visibility rules?](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
      - [Futureproofing → minimal role set for launch (e.g., Owner vs Member) vs defer roles entirely](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)

### Payments/onboarding status

  - [Stripe account setup in progress (Stevie) → some details pending; aim to avoid blocking launch-related billing flows](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Onboarding flow note: Customers submit domain → system creates workspace; need clarity on post-creation controls tied to billing and roles](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Stevie Kim](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
    
      - [Apply “Backfill last 14 days” on recently recategorized workspaces](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
      - [Clarify with Marcel: subscription↔workspace model, multi-workspace policy, invitation authority, minimal roles needed for launch](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
      - [Draft an initial access policy for EMs/admins; review with Jason](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
      - [Continue Stripe configuration; flag any blockers](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Add/user-story + acceptance-criteria detail to ambiguous launch tickets where it reduces confusion](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)

  - [All Engineers](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
    
      - [Review open PRs within 24–48h; comment/approve or request changes](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
      - [Proactively list missing launch items or unclear acceptance criteria; if short on time, DM Stevie to ticketize](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)

  - [Jose Farias](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
    
      - [None assigned; provided backfill guidance and roles implementation estimate; available for scope input once product decisions land](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)

  - [Carrie](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
    
      - [Continue workspace content/UX fixes for EM demos; coordinate with Stevie on priority workspaces](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)

[Validation](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)

  - [Admin access stance, recategorization backfill, roles/invitations scope, and billing/workspace uncertainties captured with explicit connections.](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [Action owners and decisions are clear, minimal, and skimmable.](https://fathom.video/share/MsTEsVu4zkDmNx27DyeFikj55UGNCWN9?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
